title: BLUELIGHT RAT: Internet Explorer Drive-by Compromise
description: Detects Internet Explorer making network connections to non-Microsoft domains. BLUELIGHT (S0657) uses browser exploits (CVE-2020-1380, CVE-2021-26411) for initial compromise via watering hole attacks. APT37/InkySquid abuses IE vulnerabilities to deliver the BLUELIGHT payload through malicious JavaScript on compromised sites.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Event ID' = '3' and 'Process Name' like '*\\iexplore.exe') and not (('Destination Hostname' like '*.microsoft.com' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*.windows.com' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*.bing.com' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*.live.com' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*.msn.com'))) | stats count by 'Destination Hostname', 'Source IP', 'Host Name (Server)'
falsepositives: Legitimate Internet Explorer browsing to non-Microsoft sites
Windows Update checks via IE components
splunk_original: index=sysmon EventCode=3 Image="*iexplore.exe" NOT DestinationHostname IN ("*.microsoft.com","*.windows.com","*.bing.com") | stats count by DestinationHostname, SourceIp
